tests.name: TypeScript compile error
tests.notes: Models reliably read the error site and type definition before fixing. Main failure mode: proposing fix before explicitly stating root cause.

tests.name: Silent runtime failure
tests.notes: Without a stack trace, models tend to guess rather than instrument. Stale lockfile gotcha is missed ~30% of the time without the skill prompt enforcing Phase 1.

tests.name: Flutter crash on startup
tests.notes: Known crash pattern (window_manager) is recalled correctly when skill forces reading main.dart first. Without skill, models often suggest clean rebuild instead.
